Notes: Always preserve Exact primary key. Critical for resolving SubscriptionLines.Item → product.product (via template's product_variant_id).
Direct mapping. Exact item code → Odoo Internal Reference. Both serve as the business-facing product code.
Exact search code. Odoo has no separate search code field (search is full-text on name/default_code/barcode).
Direct mapping.
Direct mapping. Exact item description → Odoo product name. Note: Exact Description is max 60 chars, Odoo name is unlimited.
Longer description (255 chars). Maps well to Odoo 'Sales Description' which is copied to SO lines, delivery orders, and invoices.

Additional notes → Odoo general description (html). Wrap plain text in

tags.
Direct mapping. Standard sales price → Odoo Sales Price.
Standard cost → Odoo Cost field. Used for margin calculations and inventory valuation.
Exact's running average cost. Odoo computes AVCO internally via stock valuation layers — not a writable field in the same way. Preserve for reconciliation.
Proposed new cost price. No Odoo equivalent (Odoo updates cost directly or via valuation).
Currency of cost prices. Resolve ISO code → res.currency.
Exact ItemGroup → Odoo product category. Requires ItemGroup GUID → product.category lookup. If ItemGroups are not migrated, default to Odoo's 'All' category.
Denormalized display field. Value derivable from ItemGroup → product.category.name.
Denormalized display field.
Default unit of measure. Resolve Exact unit code → Odoo uom.uom. Also sets uom_po_id if purchase UoM should match.
Denormalized display field.
A=Area, L=Length, O=Other, T=Time, V=Volume, W=Weight. Odoo infers UoM category from the uom.uom record itself. Stored for reference.
Default sales tax. Resolve Exact VAT code → Odoo account.tax.
Denormalized display field.
Exact taxability flag. In Odoo, taxability is determined by which taxes_id records are assigned. Stored for reference.
Direct mapping. 'Can be sold' flag.
Direct mapping. 'Can be purchased' flag.
Direct mapping. Exact stock item ≈ Odoo 'Track Inventory'. Note: subscription items are often services (is_storable=False), so verify per item.
Odoo has 'weight' (net weight for shipping). Gross weight has no native field.
Direct mapping. Net weight → Odoo weight (used in shipping calculations).
Odoo uses weight_uom_name derived from system UoM settings, not a per-product weight unit. Stored for reference.
Current stock quantity. Odoo computes qty_available from stock.quant — not a writable product field. Stock migration is a separate workstream.
Statistical/commodity code → Odoo HS Code. Both are used for international trade declarations.
Statistical net weight for trade reporting. No separate Odoo field.
Revenue GL account → Odoo Income Account. Resolve Exact GL GUID → Odoo account.account. Falls back to product category setting if empty.
Denormalized display field.
Denormalized display field.
Cost GL account → Odoo Expense Account. Same resolution as GLRevenue.
Denormalized display field.
Denormalized display field.
Stock valuation GL account. In Odoo this is typically set at the product.category level (property_stock_valuation_account_id), not per product. Stored as custom.
Denormalized display field.
Denormalized display field.
WIP revenue account. No per-product Odoo equivalent (Odoo WIP accounts are on product.category for manufacturing).
Denormalized display field.
Denormalized display field.
WIP cost account. Same rationale as GLRevenueWorkInProgress.
Denormalized display field.
Denormalized display field.
Item validity start. In Odoo, product lifecycle is controlled by 'active' boolean, not date range. Store for reference; use to derive 'active' flag.
Item validity end. Same rationale as StartDate.
Division → Company mapping.
Denormalized display field.
Denormalized display field.
Exact access control level. No Odoo equivalent.
Product image. Note: Exact's Picture field is write-only; actual image must be downloaded from PictureUrl. Odoo expects base64-encoded image in image_1920.
Original filename. No Odoo equivalent (Odoo stores images as blobs without filenames).
Runtime URL, not migratable.
Runtime URL. Use during migration to download image for image_1920, but don't store the URL itself.
Produced to inventory, not purchased. Odoo handles this via route_ids (Buy vs Manufacture). Custom for traceability.
Odoo has 'tracking' selection (none/lot/serial). Could derive tracking='serial' from this, but safer as custom + derive.
Batch tracking. Could derive tracking='lot'. Custom for traceability.
Obsolete field per Exact docs. Use IsSerialItem instead.
Obsolete field per Exact docs. Use IsBatchItem instead.
Whether fractional quantities are allowed. Odoo handles this via UoM rounding. Custom for reference.
Odoo has service_to_purchase for subcontract services and a separate subcontracting module. Custom for traceability.
No Odoo equivalent.
Time/labor item. In Odoo this would typically be type='service' + service_type='timesheet'. Custom for traceability.
Odoo uses is_published (boolean) + website_id for eCommerce visibility. Different mechanism, custom for reference.
Exact hosting/package concept. No Odoo equivalent.
Package/contract type flag. No Odoo equivalent.
Voucher functionality flag. No Odoo equivalent.
Default batch quantity. No direct Odoo equivalent.
Assembly lead time. Odoo has sale_delay (Customer Lead Time) for delivery promises, and produce_delay on MRP. Different semantics — custom.
Copy sales remarks to lines. No Odoo equivalent.
Assemble at delivery. No direct Odoo equivalent.
Exact ItemClass code (ClassID 1). Exact supports up to 10 classification dimensions per item. Odoo has no equivalent multi-axis classification. All 10 stored as custom.

Exact generic custom boolean fields (01-05). Meaning is customer-specific. All stored as x_aa_ custom fields.
Exact generic custom date fields (01-05). Meaning is customer-specific.
Exact generic custom numeric fields (01-08). Meaning is customer-specific.
Exact generic custom text fields (01-10). Meaning is customer-specific.
Exact Premium-only custom field endpoint — skip.
CRITICAL for subscriptions. Set to True for all items that appear on SubscriptionLines. This flag makes Odoo treat the product as a subscription product.

Odoo product type. Subscription items are typically 'service'. For physical subscription products (boxes, etc.), use 'consu' or 'product'. Derive from Exact IsStockItem / IsTime / item characteristics.
Should be 'order' (Ordered quantities) for subscription products per Odoo docs. 'delivery' causes issues with recurring invoice creation.
Derive from Exact StartDate/EndDate: if EndDate is set and < today → False; otherwise True.
Normally derived from IsSalesItem (Direct mapping above). Listed here as reminder: must be True for subscription products to appear on SO lines.
